title: Langkah Ringan di Atas Kaca
theme: Seorang individu menemukan cara untuk meredakan overthinking dan menemukan ketenangan dalam kesibukan sehari-hari, belajar memaafkan diri dan menerima proses hidup.

cover.prompt: A wide cinematic shot capturing the essence of Jakarta at dusk. Towering skyscrapers are illuminated by the soft, warm glow of the setting sun, gradually transitioning into the gentle twilight. A modern, elegant pedestrian bridge gracefully spans a bustling urban pathway below, connecting prominent office areas with a distant commuter station. The composition utilizes the rule of thirds, highlighting the bridge as a central, intriguing element against the vibrant city backdrop. The scene evokes a contemplative and thoughtful urban atmosphere, with a focus on architectural lines and atmospheric lighting, ensuring no specific faces are visible.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: A young professional feels overwhelmed by overthinking while crossing a modern pedestrian bridge in Jakarta. Observing a cheerful cleaner, they realize happiness is a choice independent of problem-solving. This epiphany leads to a commitment to mindfulness and self-acceptance, transforming their heavy steps into lighter ones as they embrace life's uncertainties.
